<!--
The single most useful thing you can add to a bug report is a picture of it.

The fastest way to make one is PwrSnap itself: capture the problem, then click
the **Med** copy button — in the float-over toast right after you capture, or
from the library — and paste (⌘V) straight into the "Screenshot" box below.
Annotate it in PwrSnap first (arrows, highlights, blur) if that makes the
problem clearer.

Don't have PwrSnap installed yet? Grab it at https://pwrsnap.com.
-->
